fix: show store dropdown and quantity buttons on mobile (no hover needed)

group-hover:opacity-100 so controls are always visible on touch devices

fix: prevent store dropdown from clipping on small screens

so the assign-to-store dropdown stays within card bounds on narrow viewports.

build: force NDK sysroot to prevent system header inclusion

- Add CFLAGS and CPPFLAGS with -isysroot to exclude system headers
- This prevents Kivy compilation from mixing x86_64 and ARM headers
- Forces exclusive use of NDK headers during cross-compilation

fix: remove Android detection from is_compiled to fix buildozer build

- Checking for Android in is_compiled prevents dependency installation during build
- Android runtime detection should be handled separately if needed (Kivy may handle this)
- Fixes Android APK build failure with buildozer

commit.message:
v0.1.12: revert to v0.1.10 base + apply ha-mcp-bridge s6 pattern

Root cause of v0.1.11 failure:
addon/run.sh was mode 100644 in git. The Dockerfile RUN chmod sets the
bit at build time, but the Supervisor clones fresh on rebuild — git
restores the original 100644 mode, so s6-overlay cannot exec the script:
  s6-overlay-suexec: fatal: can only run as pid 1

Fix (mirrors ha-mcp-bridge v0.1.2 which works):
- Reverted Dockerfile/run.sh to v0.1.10 as clean base
- Applied services.d pattern (no ENTRYPOINT override)
- Changed run.sh shebang to with-contenv bashio
- git update-index --chmod=+x addon/run.sh (mode 100644 -> 100755)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: ha-basic-addon
repository.description: Basic Repo for Add On structures for reg

commit.message:
stdlib: enforce same-type constraint on Min/Max/Clamp, add edge case tests

- Min/Max now reject mixed integer/real arguments at compile time
  (spec: both arguments must be the same numeric kind)
- Clamp now rejects mixed integer/real arguments at compile time
  (spec: all three arguments must be the same numeric kind)
- Remove mixed-type coercion from runtime min_max_value and clamp_value
- Remove dead numeric_as_real helper
- Rewrite clamp_mixed_numeric_forms test to expect compile error
- Add min_real, max_real tests for real-valued arguments
- Add min/max/clamp mixed-type compile error tests
- Add conv edge case tests: IntToHex negative, HexToInt 0X prefix,
  StrToReal whitespace trimming

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: functional-pascal
repository.description: A modern, function-first programming language built on Pascal's readable syntax — compiles to bytecode and runs on a managed VM.

commit.message:
v0.1.11: fix s6-overlay Dockerfile and run.sh

- Remove ENTRYPOINT [run.sh] — overriding the base image entrypoint
  bypasses s6-overlay (PID 1): s6-overlay-suexec: fatal: can only run as pid 1
- Register service at /etc/services.d/ha-basic-addon/run
- Change run.sh shebang to with-contenv bashio so SUPERVISOR_TOKEN
  is exported from s6 container environment before Python starts
- pip -> pip3 in Dockerfile

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.description: Basic Repo for Add On structures for reg

commit.message:
Make planner recipe cards clickable links to recipe detail

Wrap the image + title portion of each meal slot recipe card in a
<Link> pointing to /recipe/:id. The X remove button remains outside
the link so both interactions work independently.

Applies to both the desktop grid and the mobile stack layouts.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Switch planner layout breakpoint from lg to xl (1024→1280px)

7-column grid + sidebar needs more horizontal room. Moving the
desktop/mobile switch to xl prevents column overlap and card
overflow at intermediate window sizes (1024–1279px).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Replace Weekly/Monthly toggle with prev/next week chevron buttons
- Add Today button (appears only when not on current week)

- weekStart is now mutable state; changing it re-fetches the meal plan

fix: picker drawer overlap with single result

Float truncation in overlay.rs: (72.8 / 18.2) as usize = 3 instead
of 4 due to f32 precision loss from subtraction (panel_bottom -
panel_top). This made available_lines=3, num_visible=0, causing the
status line and result to render at the same y coordinate.

Fix: round to nearest integer instead of truncating.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: indexer never writes files, vault-wide block ID uniqueness

Remove block ID assignment from the indexer thread — it was writing
directly to disk via atomic_write(), bypassing the self-write hash
guard and causing false reload prompts.

Block IDs are now assigned only when a file is open in the editor,
via ensure_block_ids() on Insert→Normal transitions. Files without
IDs are indexed as-is.

Also adds vault-wide collision avoidance:
- BloomEditor.known_block_ids cache, refreshed on IndexComplete
- compute_block_id_assignments() accepts optional known IDs set
- New IDs inserted into cache immediately on assignment

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Bloom
repository.description: A local-first, Vim-modal note editor for networked thinking. Built in Rust.

commit.message:
refactor: centralize autosave as debounced timer

Replace 4 scattered autosave_if_dirty() calls with a single
schedule_autosave() at the end of handle_key(). Uses buffer's
existing is_dirty() (version != clean_version) to detect mutations.

- handle_key() = handle_key_inner() + schedule_autosave()
- 300ms debounce: rapid edits/undo/redo coalesce into one save
- Insert mode suppressed (fires on Insert→Normal transition)
- save_page() clears deadline to prevent redundant flush
- Removes undo/redo-specific deadline special cases

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
